item.title: Chambers
item.description: Just to be clear, this isn’t Old English like Beowulf—it’s modern English written in an old-fashioned or archaic style, more like Elizabethan or Victorian English. TLNR go read Beowulf
item.dc:creator: Multipass

item.title: Gift Comic, Loving Reaper (I promise this one is cute)
item.description:
I love this series. The artist is Jenny Jinya, the series is Loving Reaper. This comic can be found at https://m.webtoons.com/en/canvas/loving-reaper/gift-comic/viewer?title_no=353275&episode_no=69 Warning- a majority of the series will make you cry, this is a beautiful and poignant series.
Zon wishes you all a happy Caturday!
Our buddy Mister, who had absolutely no problems reminding me it was time for food, any time was time for food. I miss that cuddle bug!
item.dc:creator: IgnisInvictus

item.title: 1830 Paper-View Peepshow
item.description: This antique Tunnel Book is a true marvel of universal culture. It can be found under the name "Les Tuileries" and depicts the magnificent three-scene peepshow at the Arc de Triomphe, the Champs-Élysées, the Tuileries, and other locations in Paris, just as they appeared in the early 19th century. #mildly_interesting #awesome #books #creativity #aww

item.title: The city of Istanbul is no stranger to historical architecture. This building is a remarkable example of how historical cities are layered over time, each level is a chapter in a story that stretches back through antiquity
item.description: The city of Istanbul is no stranger to historical architecture. This building is a remarkable example of how historical cities are layered over time, each level is a chapter in a story that stretches back through antiquity and spans multiple historical time periods.� The structure’s ground floor dates back more than 1,800 years and has been built upon and adapted repeatedly over the centuries.� Beyond being a fascinating piece of architecture in a city steeped in history, this building also stands as a testament to the craftsmanship of past builders, a record of their skill and hard work. It’s a powerful example of historical architecture that tells a story and is a reminder of how the past and present connect.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

https://www.youtube.com/shorts/ujJ58kSz8Iw 1890's milkshaker. I could teach you how to do this, but i'll have to charge you because it's better than yours.
Pantone 7488 As always, if you know any sources, share them and I'll gladly add them.

item.title: The clitoris wasnt mapped until 1998
item.description: The clitoris vanishing act https://projects.huffingtonpost.com/projects/cliteracy/embed/history Beyond the tip of the iceberg: A meta-analysis of the anatomy of the clitoris onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/joa.12070 Academia.edu/22796305/anatomy_of_the_clitoris unibas.ch/en/News-Events/News/uni-campus/The-clitoris-an-anatomical-taboo.html A brief history of the clitoris Link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10508-020-01638-6 Vice.com/en/article/fear-of-the-clit-a-brief-history-of-medical-books-erasing-womens-genitalia/ New context, new content-Rethinking genital anatomy in textbooks Pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/3509867/ Oxford academic-Clinical implications of the historical, medical, and social neglect of the clitoris Academic.oup.com/jsm/article-abstract/20/4/418/7097740 A Comprehensive Review of the Clitoris and Its Role in Female Sexual Function https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S2050052115301359

item.title: I lied, a meme dump
item.description:
Root beer, humans love it.
Something, something poyo...
*undoes giant novelty Texas belt bucle*
In this economy?
More fun than it sounds like, please wear wading shoes though or you'll crack your head slipping on rock grime.
Soundscloud is nice, but please don't forget to press some actual physical copies of that EP.
Fast and more fun than waiting for the government to get back to you about money they owe vs. money you owe.
Save room, we're having Akira for dessert.
We're making our own series marathon, with blackjack and hookers.
*loud fan SFX*
It's kind of funny, but don't actually do this. Whippets will make literal holes in your brain - not kidding.
Which one though? Original series, the Animated series, Next Generation, Deep Space Nine, Voyager, Enterprise, Discovery, Picard, Strange New Wolrds, or Lower Decks? So much Trek, so little time.
"Agent 408 requests a shipment of surveillance equipment and cheeseburgers with which to honeypot Krasnov?"
*Hat Man intensifies*
This next one is going to blow your socks clean off though.
item.dc:creator: circlebreaker

item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: What Happened Today #113
item.description: Trump is weaponizing economic pressure to bend people and companies to his will. Law firms offer millions in tribute, companies cut thousands of jobs as their contracts are canceled while others have to abandon workers when the White House cancels their right to work in the US. But judges keep blocking his retaliation campaigns, proving his power isn't absolute even as his self-proclaimed retribution actions attack multiple institutions. The question is whether we'll fight back before the whole economy becomes his enforcement arm. Indivisible's training next Tuesday can show how you and your family, friends, and neighbors can fight back. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-private-companies 2. https://go.govbrief.today/planned-parenthood-clinics 3. https://go.govbrief.today/maha-science-questioned 4. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-harvard-intl-students 5. https://go.govbrief.today/nuclear-regulatory-commission 6. https://go.govbrief.today/national-security-council 7. https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-reporter-restrictions 8. https://go.govbrief.today/guatemalan-must-be-returned 9. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-suck-it 10. https://go.govbrief.today/nj-sanctuary-cities 11. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-border-shelters 12. https://go.govbrief.today/disney-tps-venezuelans 13. https://go.govbrief.today/snap-data-immigration 14. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-discovery-blocked 15. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-doge 16. https://go.govbrief.today/jenner-order-unconstitutional 17. https://go.govbrief.today/san-diego-airport 18. https://go.govbrief.today/indivisible-training-may27 Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-autism-artifical
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
